jobs.title: 9-12th Grade Science Teacher
jobs.content: <p><strong>About ACP</strong></p><p>Academy with Community Partners seeks a 9-12th grade science teacher to lead inquiry-based instruction & small-cohort lab labs.</p>

jobs.title: Special Education Teacher
jobs.content: <p>Lead ACP&rsquo;s special-education program for 9-12th grade students with IEP-based accommodations.</p>

jobs.title: Special Education Teacher (Part-time)
jobs.content: <p>Part-time ACP special-education role serving IEP students on a half-time schedule.</p>
